author: writer-1
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9; author writer-1 is the experiment-designer role, doc-owner pseudonym designer-1 — the RT-14 identity vocabulary has no designer token): resolves the 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:per-judge-invocation-specs+prompt-templates+builder-and-style-rules-shas(...)-staged-by-ops-amendment-before-any-adjudication-call' harness_manifest placeholder BEFORE any adjudication call, as the frozen adjudication_protocol requires. VALUE RECIPE (f2 amendment-6 convention): sha256 over the canonical JSON (sort_keys, compact separators, UTF-8) of the {relpath: sha256-of-file-bytes} staged-bytes dict; the dict itself is committed verbatim as poc/truthstyle-2x2/harness-manifest.json (canonical bytes + one trailing newline; that file's own sha256 = d3cd94bd3f2e86fe772d39061dd214c9c7a297d9487bbaed8f84a15914f6c83c), so the pin is independently re-derivable. WHAT THE SHA COVERS (8 files): poc/truthstyle-2x2/judges-invocation.md (the pinned per-judge invocation spec: exact commands for judge-p1 gpt-5.6-sol and judge-p2 gpt-5.5 via npx codex 0.144.1 effort low, and judge-p3 claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 via a headless tool-less single-shot Claude Code sub-process; prompt assembly = item question bytes verbatim; pinned item-order seeds dts/1|judge-p1..p3|20260710; the yes/no/cannot-say output token set with the pinned normalization incl. 'cannot say'->'cannot-say'; attempt validity, zero-tool and identity tripwires, blinding audit, retries, no-label contract, preflight calibration probes; sha256 5b543f41635f4676382952bd1f6cd75daafa6f4e2186d64ed7f34de06467543d); poc/truthstyle-2x2/output-schema-dts.json (server-side answer enum for the codex judges); poc/truthstyle-2x2/judge-p3-system-prompt.txt (byte-exact format-only system prompt); poc/truthstyle-2x2/build-dts.py and poc/truthstyle-2x2/style-rules.json (byte-identical to the frozen placeholder's parenthetical shas 1edb96f4... and b65837d4...); data/d-ts/items.jsonl and data/d-ts/manifest.json (the built corpus, consistent with the frozen corpus_hashes.d-ts pin, re-verified via tools/registry/corpus-pin.py convention at staging); analysis/truthstyle_2x2.py (byte-identical to the frozen pins.analysis_script sha). Operationalization stipulations are registered as ASM-0240 (judge-p3 headless sub-process form; the in-session Agent-tool sub-agent form is adjudicated NON-conforming and forbidden), ASM-0241 (pool-wide temperature-0 discharge), ASM-0242 (order-seed reading + uniform normalization). corpus_hashes.d-ts-labels remains a placeholder: it is pinned by a LATER ops amendment AFTER adjudication completes and BEFORE the final-phase record. One-shot pin discipline: ANY change to a staged byte before the final-phase run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record, not a new ops amendment.
